title: Update kpod rm to use new container state
body:
kpod rm now uses the new container state and runtime

Signed-off-by: Urvashi Mohnani <umohnani@redhat.com>

comments.body: Force is broken right now (we don't have the ability to stop containers yet, so we can't remove running containers). But otherwise this should work

:pushpin: Commit bd51798 has been approved by `mheon`

:zap: Test exempted: pull fully rebased and already tested.
